title: rosa × schleicheri var. neilreichii
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. neilreichii, commonly known as Neilreich's rose or Schleicher's rose, is a hybrid plant species within the family Rosaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Rosa × schleicheri var. neilreichii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits.
